ns0:entry.ns0:title: Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Dailin521/codex-provider-sync
Language: c%23
Synchronize Codex session provider metadata across rollout files and SQLite state.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: LegendaryGaoZheng/Cross-Game-Recoil-Control
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/LegendaryGaoZheng/Cross-Game-Recoil-Control
Language: c%23
部署极其简单，高效，多功能的跨平台压枪脚本，可绕过各大主流反作弊系统，适配《三角洲行动》，《CS2》，《PUBG》等一系列游戏。Effortless deployment, efficient, and versatile cross-platform aimbot script that bypasses major mainstream anti-cheat systems, compatible with games such as Delta Force, CS2, PUBG, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: PowerShell/PowerShell
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/PowerShell/PowerShell
Language: c%23
PowerShell for every system!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/SakiRinn/LiveCaptions-Translator
Language: c%23
Lightweight and powerful real-time audio/speech translation tool based on Windows LiveCaptions.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: bitwarden/server
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/bitwarden/server
Language: c%23
Bitwarden infrastructure/backend (API, database, Docker, etc).

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/eShop
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/eShop
Language: c%23
A reference .NET application implementing an eCommerce site

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/efcore
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/efcore
Language: c%23
EF Core is a modern object-database mapper for .NET. It supports LINQ queries, change tracking, updates, and schema migrations.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/extensions
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/extensions
Language: c%23
This repository contains a suite of libraries that provide facilities commonly needed when creating production-ready applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/maui
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/maui
Language: c%23
.NET MAUI is the .NET Multi-platform App UI, a framework for building native device applications spanning mobile, tablet, and desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/roslyn
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/roslyn
Language: c%23
The Roslyn .NET compiler provides C# and Visual Basic languages with rich code analysis APIs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/runtime
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/runtime
Language: c%23
.NET is a cross-platform runtime for cloud, mobile, desktop, and IoT apps.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/sdk
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/sdk
Language: c%23
Core functionality needed to create .NET Core projects, that is shared between Visual Studio and CLI

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dotnet/wpf
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dotnet/wpf
Language: c%23
WPF is a .NET Core UI framework for building Windows desktop applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/itsfatduck/optimizerDuck
Language: c%23
Free, open-source Windows optimization tool for performance, privacy, and simplicity.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/microsoft/PowerToys

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/mob-sakai/ParticleEffectForUGUI

Render particle effect in UnityUI(uGUI). Maskable, sortable, and no extra Camera/RenderTexture/Canvas.
